title: DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER - 211info
text: BETHANY COMMUNITY LIBRARY DAYTIME WINTER WARMING CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Offers a drop-in day space to go inside out of the cold to warm up temporarily throughout the winter season. Additional services may be offered. 15325 NW Central Drive Suite J-8 Portland, OR 97229 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: Monday-Thursday 10am-8pm, Friday-Saturday 10am-5pm, Sunday noon-5pm (503) 617-7323 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 617-7323 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in, call ahead to confirm hours. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Washington County Services: Extreme Cold Warming Centers If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. BETHANY COMMUNITY LIBRARY
